metaDescription: Secure passwordless authentication service using Passkey and Magic Link.
description: Choose your preferred secure login method
passkeyDescription: Fast and secure sign in using Touch ID, Face ID, or Windows Hello.
magicLinkDescription: We will email you a secure link to log in instantly.
toastErrorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
toastErrorPasskey: Passkey sign-in was cancelled or unavailable.

register.title: Complete your profile
register.description: Pick a username to finish setting up your account. Your name and birthday are optional.
register.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

consent.title: Authorize {app}
consent.description: {app} wants to sign you in with your account. You can revoke access anytime from your account settings.
consent.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

account.title: Your account
account.profileDescription: Update your username and personal details.
account.passkeysDescription: Sign in faster with Touch ID, Face ID, or a security key.
account.passkeysHint: Add a passkey to sign in without a magic link.
account.noPasskeys: You haven't added any passkeys yet.
account.appsDescription: Apps you've allowed to sign you in.
account.sessionsDescription: Devices currently signed in to your account.

admin.title: Admin
admin.secretWarning: Copy this now — it won't be shown again.
admin.regenerateConfirm: Generate a new secret? The old one stops working.
admin.deleteConfirm: Delete this app? This cannot be undone.
admin.formRolesHint: Comma-separated role names for this app.
admin.formDefaultRolesHint: Auto-assigned to each new member on link (must be valid roles).
admin.formTrustedHint: Skip the consent screen for this app.
admin.formConfidentialHint: Issues a client secret (for server-side apps).
